author: vvo
subject: v2.2.0
body: # [2.2.0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.1.0...v2.2.0) (2017-01-17) ### Bug Fixes * **clear:** clearing wasn't working with too+ same type facets selected (algolia/react-instantsearch#1820) ([0ef2f78](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/0ef2f78)) * **connectSearchBox:** handle `defaultRefinement` (algolia/react-instantsearch#1829) ([334bbe4](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/334bbe4)), closes [#1826](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1826) * **Instantsearch:** Update all props on InstantSearch (algolia/react-instantsearch#1828) ([9a29790](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/9a29790)) * **InstantSearch:** add specific `react-instantsearch ${version}` agent (algolia/react-instantsearch#1844) ([9133dfa](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/9133dfa)) * **SFFV:** correct propTypes and add missing default values (algolia/react-instantsearch#1845) ([a259626](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/a259626)) * **test:** add missing Snippet and Highliter snapshot ([23eaae4](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/23eaae4)) * **widgets:** replace setImmediate use with Promise use when update is needed (algolia/react-instantsearch#1811) ([613b17a](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/613b17a)) ### Features * **Menu, connectMenu:** add search for facet values (algolia/react-instantsearch#1822) ([272fc83](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/272fc83)) * **snippet:** add a snippet widget to be able to highlight snippet results (algolia/react-instantsearch#1797) ([ea1b361](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/ea1b361)) * **widgets:** add transformItems to be able to sort and filter (algolia/react-instantsearch#1809) ([04da328](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/04da328))
